_comment: Main_5_train_evaluate_tune_tree_model_evolution.ipynb — tuned tree (BayesSearchCV) + full axial profile. Keys consumed: top-level test_size/random_state/model_to_tune/full_profile_max_rows; random_forest, xgboost, gradient_boosting, adaboost blocks (used as untuned defaults when IF_HYPERPARAM_TUNING=False); tuning.*. See docs/ML_CONFIG_GUIDE.md.
_processed_stem_comment: Pins data/processed/features_targets_training_data_complete_<stem>.pkl (course default: the sample150 release dataset). Set to null for the newest features_targets_*.pkl.
_full_profile_max_rows_comment: Row cap for the axial-profile model. 60000 covers the whole sample150 course dataset (~30k rows) and keeps Colab responsive; research-scale value was null (no cap).

tuning._comment: BayesSearchCV budget for the exit-plane model_to_tune, only used when IF_HYPERPARAM_TUNING=True. Course default n_iter=25 fits free Colab; research-scale value was 60.
